zh.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh.Huntington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾亨廷頓
zh.Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Crawford於1145年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，他的父親Reginald Crawford40歲，母親Margaret Sweinsdotter36歲。他於1165年與Margaret de Huntington -在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德享年103歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Crawford于1145年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，他的父亲Reginald Crawford40岁，母亲Margaret Sweinsdotter36岁。他于1165年与Margaret de Huntington -在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1248年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德享年103岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Crawford was born in 1145, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Reginald Crawford, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Sweinsdotter, was 36. He married Margaret de Huntington - in 1165, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1248, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 103, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Crawford est né en 1145, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Reginald Crawford, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sweinsdotter, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Huntington - en 1165, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1248, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 103 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Crawford 1145 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald Crawford 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Sweinsdotter 36. Er hat 1165 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland Margaret de Huntington - geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1248 im Alter von 103 Jahren in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Crawford è nato il nel 1145 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Reginald Crawford, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Sweinsdotter, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Huntington - nel 1165, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1248, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 103 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Crawfordが1145年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父Reginald Crawfordは40歳，母Margaret Sweinsdotterは36歳であった。1165年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでMargaret de Huntington -と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで103歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Crawford(이)가 1145년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Crawford(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Sweinsdotter(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1165년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Margaret de Huntington -(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 103세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland: Crawford, Lanerk, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Crawford nasceu em 1145, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Reginald Crawford, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sweinsdotter, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Huntington - em 1165, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1248, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 103 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Crawford родился в 1145 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Reginald Crawford было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sweinsdotter, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Huntington - в 1165 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1248 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 103 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Crawford nació en 1145, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Reginald Crawford, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Sweinsdotter, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret de Huntington - en 1165, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1248, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 103 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
